name: ai-standards-enterprise
description: Enterprise quality gates and security policies for multi-stack development

block_deep_offset.message: BLOCKED: OFFSET > 1000 detected. Use keyset pagination instead.

require_covered_index.message: WARNING: Query missing covered index. Add appropriate index.

block_n_plus_one.message: BLOCKED: N+1 query pattern detected. Use eager loading.

block_function_in_where.message: BLOCKED: Function in WHERE clause prevents index usage.

require_policy.message: BLOCKED: Resource controller without Policy authorization.

require_dto.message: WARNING: API response without DTO transformation.

require_zod_validation.message: BLOCKED: Handler without Zod schema validation.

require_cors_headers.message: BLOCKED: API route missing CORS configuration.

require_cache_headers.message: WARNING: GET endpoint without cache headers.

require_cache_strategy.message: WARNING: No cache strategy defined for hot path.

require_offline_support.message: WARNING: Network request without offline handling.

block_pii.message: BLOCKED: PII detected in log statement.

require_correlation_id.message: WARNING: Log entry without correlation ID.

require_structured.message: WARNING: Unstructured log format. Use JSON.

require_test_for_new_code.message: BLOCKED: New file without corresponding test.

require_data_provider.message: WARNING: Test without data provider for edge cases.

block_hardcoded_secrets.message: BLOCKED: Hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables.

block_todo_without_issue.message: BLOCKED: TODO comment without issue reference.

require_return_types.message: WARNING: Function without explicit return type.

block_else_after_return.message: Style: Remove unnecessary else after return.

require_immutability.message: WARNING: Mutable operation on shared state.

denylist.message: Access to sensitive file blocked by security policy.
